Ground Truth:
log(x) + log(y) - z = 0

Component functions:
  g1(x) = log(x)
  g2(y) = log(y)
  g3(z) = -z


Fitted Equation:
0.46491957**(1.37752329403987*x - 2.42043487927629) - 1.3192385 + 0.46101037**(1.3803612461087*y - 2.39224482549679) - 1.3228908 + 1.9302848632466*z - 1.75152719971354 = 0.0022
R²_ortho = 0.2592

Component functions:
  g1(x) = 0.46491957**(1.37752329403987*x - 2.42043487927629) - 1.3192385
  g2(y) = 0.46101037**(1.3803612461087*y - 2.39224482549679) - 1.3228908
  g3(z) = 1.9302848632466*z - 1.75152719971354
